report.summary: Audited recent pages/components for UX issues, created 4 missing OG images, and fixed FundingRateTracker mobile responsiveness, accessibility, and dropdown readability.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: FundingRateTracker: Added horizontal scroll for mobile — table grid with 7 fixed-width columns now scrolls instead of overflowing on small screens (overflowX: auto + minWidth: max-content)
FundingRateTracker: Added aria-label='Search tokens' to search input for screen reader accessibility
FundingRateTracker: Fixed <option> elements in sort dropdown with explicit background (#1e293b) and color (#ffffff) to ensure readability across browsers
Audited Lido V3 stVaults and Institutional Crypto Adoption guide pages — both well-structured with proper metadata, breadcrumbs, structured data, and OG images already in place
Audited SolanaLSTCalculator — properly implements inputMode='decimal', aria-label, min/max constraints; inline styles prevent :focus pseudo-class but consistent with codebase pattern

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: onchain-order-book-clob-dex-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG, DeFi badge)
OG image: ethereum-layer-2-comparison-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG, Ethereum badge)
OG image: katana-perps-idex-acquisition-guide (1200x630 SVG, DeFi badge)
OG image: tokenized-funds-institutional-defi-guide (1200x630 SVG, RWA badge)

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: SolanaLSTCalculator component — pass (good input validation and accessibility)
